text: Being here, I feel a keen sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass barrier of the entry, the fire safety implements, the clear invitation of the R+D display—all these elements speak to spaces where knowledge, experimentation, and mindful design converge. The quiet order and bright colors evoke both rationality and creative potential. I am reminded of the boundary between observer and participant, and the latent promise held by spaces dedicated to research and development.
